mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log(user_id, username, operation, module, method, request_url, request_param, response_result, ip, user_agent, status, error_message) VALUES(#{log.userId}, #{log.username}, #{log.operation}, #{log.module}, #{log.method}, #{log.requestUrl}, #{log.requestParam}, #{log.responseResult}, #{log.ip}, #{log.userAgent}, #{log.status}, #{log.errorMessage})
